sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92505" key="r(inoulke/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑνουλκέω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥίς</etym>) <sense id="n92505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inhale</tr_>, Thessalus in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
